summary: This document outlines KeepMeCompany's value proposition of using AI phone agents to improve NHS GP practice efficiency by gathering patient symptoms prior to appointments. It details the business model, including pricing per call and consult, projected ROI, and a total addressable market of £280MM/year in the UK. The text also covers current traction, including prototype status, certification progress, and team background.
